product_overview: A microservices-based backend for food ordering, kitchen ticketing, catalog management and inventory tracking with JWT-authenticated API gateway, event-driven flows (RabbitMQ) and full observability. Services expose REST endpoints via KrakenD with per-service databases, Redis caching for catalog, and automated stock deduction via BOM expansion.
core_goals: Provide a secure, JWT-protected REST API surface via KrakenD for client and service traffic.
Support end-to-end order lifecycle: order creation, kitchen ticketing, and inventory deduction using event-driven RabbitMQ flows.
Maintain a single source of truth for menu and BOM data in Catalog Service with recursive BOM expansion for inventory calculations.
Ensure resilience between services (circuit breaker on Order→Kitchen), traceability (X-Correlation-ID) and observability (Prometheus/Grafana/Loki).
Enable inventory accuracy with auto-deduction by BOM and manual stock operations (restock, deduct, transactions) and low-stock alerts.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Register new users and obtain RS256 JWTs for authenticated operations (used by protected endpoints across services).
user_flows: POST /v1/auth/register with valid username/password/email -> Receive 201 Created with user_id
POST /v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /v1/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Create and manage customer orders. Creating an order publishes an event that drives kitchen and inventory workflows.
user_flows: POST /v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /v1/orders with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and valid order payload (customer_id, items, total_amount) -> Receive 201 Created with order_id
POST /v1/orders with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and invalid payload (missing required fields) -> Receive 400 Bad Request
POST /v1/orders without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /v1/orders with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and valid order payload -> Receive 201 Created with order_id -> GET /v1/kitchen/status/{order_id} -> Receive 200 with kitchen ticket status

features.name: Kitchen Operations
features.description: Expose kitchen ticket status so clients or operators can check preparation progress for a given order.
user_flows: GET /v1/kitchen/status/{order_id} -> Receive 200 with kitchen ticket status (Received|Cooking|Ready) and ticket details
GET /v1/kitchen/status/{nonexistent_order_id} -> Receive 404 Not Found
GET /v1/kitchen/status/{order_id} -> Receive 200 with ticket including items array (when order created contained item details)

features.name: Catalog Management
features.description: Manage menus, ingredients, and master recipe (BOM) data used by ordering and inventory services. Write operations require authentication.
user_flows: GET /v1/catalog/menus -> Receive 200 with list of menu items (name, price, category, availability)
GET /v1/catalog/ingredients -> Receive 200 with list of ingredients
POST /v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /v1/catalog/menus with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and valid menu payload -> Receive 201 Created with menu_id
POST /v1/catalog/menus without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /v1/catalog/ingredients with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and valid ingredient payload -> Receive 201 Created with ingredient_id
POST /v1/catalog/menus with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and invalid BOM entry (both ingredient_id and sub_menu_item_id set or both null) -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Track raw materials and stock transactions, support restock and manual deduction, and provide transaction history. Inventory auto-deduction is driven by kitchen events and Catalog BOM lookups.
user_flows: GET /v1/inventory/materials -> Receive 200 with list of raw materials and current_stock
POST /v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /v1/inventory/stock/restock with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and restock payload (material_id, quantity, note) -> Receive 200 Created with transaction_id
POST /v1/inventory/stock/restock without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /v1/inventory/stock/deduct with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and valid deduct payload (order_id, items with menu_item_id, quantity, portion_multiplier) -> Receive 200 with deduction transactions
POST /v1/inventory/stock/deduct with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and failing BOM lookup from Catalog Service -> Receive 502 Bad Gateway
GET /v1/inventory/transactions with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> -> Receive 200 with paginated transaction history

features.name: Kitchen Operations
features.description: Managing order preparation in the kitchen

endpoints.description: Get kitchen status for an order

features.name: Catalog Management
features.description: Managing menus, choices, addons, and portions
